Whale OS Maintains partnerships with all major content providers to ensure your apps always work! What does this mean for you? It means you never have to see the “YouTube is not supported on this device” message again.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

2. Built for the African Market

Optimized for Kenyan internet speeds and local content preferences. We understand what you need from a smart TV.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

3. Regular Updates & Long – Term Support

Unlike abandoned AOSP systems, Whale OS receives regular security updates and new features.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

4. Easy Setup

Works right out of the box. Log into YouTube, Netflix and your favorite apps from the App Store in minutes![/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

5. Affordable Pricing

Premium features without premium prices. This affects millions of users across Kenya and Africa.

In late 2025, Google announced it would discontinue support for applications on Android Open Source Project (AOSP) based smart TVs. This decision affected millions of users who suddenly found their YouTube app and other Google services no longer working.

Timeline of the issue:

  • December 2025: First Reports of YouTube not working on certain TV models.
  • December 31st, 2025: Major Spike in “YouTube not working on smart TV” searches
  • January 2026: Ongoing issues with no fix for AOSP TVs

This wasn’t your TV breaking down – it was a deliberate change by Google that left many smart TV owners without access to essential streaming services.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/tab][tab icon_family=”none” title=”QLED TV” id=”1776686162706-8″ tab_id=”1776686162706-2″][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”]
